item.deadrecall.backpack.tooltip.no_nest: Cannot be placed inside another backpack
item.deadrecall.backpack.tooltip.death_d: Drops separately on death; not collected into death backpacks
item.deadrecall.backpack.tooltip.firepro: Fireproof body: cannot burn in fire or lava
item.deadrecall.backpack.tooltip.content: Content safety: if destroyed by explosions, cactus, fire, despawn, etc., stored items spill out
item.deadrecall.backpack.tooltip.protect: Protection: no extra body protection; contents spill if destroyed or despawned, except in the void
Protection: resists cactus; other destruction spills contents, except in the void
Protection: resists cactus and explosions; other destruction spills contents, except in the void
Protection: fire, lava, cactus, explosions, and despawn; void is not protected
item.deadrecall.death_backpack.tooltip.p: Persists after landing; removed after closing when emptied
Protection: immune to damage, despawn, and the void; gains upward momentum and slow fall below the void damage line
advancements.deadrecall.root.title: DeadRecall
advancements.deadrecall.root.description: Start exploring backpacks, death protection, and practical alchemy.
advancements.deadrecall.pig_manure_hit_e: Hit a living entity with pig manure.

message.deadrecall.alchemy.cocoa_added: Cocoa powder added to the cauldron
message.deadrecall.sort_backpack.need_ba: Use the sort shortcut while a container screen is open
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.select_: Copper golem selected. Right-click a container to bind it
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.left_cl: Left-click a copper golem to select it, left-click a bound container to unbind it, Shift+left-click to show paths, Shift+right-click to view bindings
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.need_co: That block is not a container
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.cannot_: Copper containers are source containers and cannot be bound as sorting targets
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.bind_su: Container added. This copper golem will use its bound containers
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.bind_du: That container is already bound to this copper golem
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.unbind_: Container removed from this copper golem's bound targets
That container is not a target of the selected copper golem
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.golem_u: The selected copper golem is no longer available
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.target_: The bound container is no longer available
The copper golem and container are in different dimensions and cannot be bound or shown as a path
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.binding: Reduce bindings or add paging later
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.fuel_le: Left-click: insert fuel from main hand
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.fuel_ne: Hold fuel in your main hand
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.fuel_in: That item is not valid fuel
message.deadrecall.copper_wrench.fuel_mi: The fuel slot contains a different fuel
